SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES. PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER. DEFENDANT APPEARING BY ATTORNEY TREVOR MONTGOMERY. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY BOTH PARTIES AND RETAINED. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 525.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MALFATTI, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WITHERELL, HEIIDI $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00, CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ANTHONY MALFATTI AND AGAINST HEIDI WITHERELL. $ 0 PRINCIPAL, $ 0 ATTORNEY FEES, $ 0 COSTS, $ 0 INTEREST. TOTAL JUDGMENT $ 0. BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT CHARGE FOR ATTEMPTS TO STAIN, DEFENDANT SUFFERED NO DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT WITHERELL, HEIIDI
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALFATTI, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WITHERELL, HEIIDI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WITHERELL, HEIIDI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MALFATTI, ANTHONY $620.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
